title: ItemShowPlus
description: Show your items with an easy comand
body:
ItemShowPlus - The ultimate flexing plugin

Ever wanted to flex on your friends about your cool gear? well now you can! This plugin isnt basic, as it has many config options for showing.

Why Choose ItemShowPlus?

ItemShowPlus elevates your Minecraft server's social experience by allowing players to seamlessly share their items in chat with rich, detailed hover information. 

Here's why your server needs this plugin:

Enhanced Player Interaction

Players can proudly showcase their hard-earned gear, rare finds, or custom-crafted items directly in chat. This creates organic conversation points and opportunities for players to connect over their achievements.

Intuitive Commands

With simple commands like /item or /i, players can instantly share what they're holding. No complicated syntax or learning curve - just intuitive functionality that anyone can use.

Comprehensive Item Details

When players hover over an item in chat, they'll see:

Full enchantment list with proper Roman numeral levels
Custom item lore and descriptions
Current and maximum durability stats
Item attributes and special properties - All of these configurable

Server-Friendly Features

Performance Optimized: Lightweight code ensures minimal server impact

Highly Configurable: Customize every aspect through the config.yml

Anti-Spam Protection: Built-in cooldown system prevents chat flooding

World Restrictions: Disable the command in specific worlds where item showing might not be appropriate


Staff-Friendly Moderation

For server admins and moderators, ItemShowPlus makes item verification simple. Need to check if 
someone's claims about their gear are legitimate? Ask them to show it in chat and see the exact enchantments and properties.

Community Building

ItemShowPlus encourages players to engage with each other about their items, fostering a sense of community and friendly competition. From comparing gear to admiring rare finds, your community will have more reasons to interact.

Future-Proof Design

Built with the latest Spigot/Paper API, ItemShowPlus is designed to work with current and future Minecraft versions, ensuring long-term compatibility with your server.
Whether you're running a survival, RPG, or PvP server, ItemShowPlus adds a valuable social dimension that enhances player experience without complicated setup or maintenance
